sub: A predictable rhythm tuned for agencies juggling multiple client timelines.

steps.title: Discovery Call
steps.blurb: Book a 30-minute call. We scope the brief, confirm fit, and align on outcomes. No pricing pressure.

steps.title: 24-hour Proposal
steps.blurb: Custom scope, timeline, and pricing in your inbox within one business day. No templates, no boilerplate.

steps.title: Build
steps.blurb: Daily Slack updates, weekly demos, single point of contact. You stay in control of every milestone.

steps.title: Handoff
steps.blurb: White-label or branded delivery, your choice. Documentation, training, and post-launch support included.
